title: Compact Machines Infinite
description: This mod made the Compact Machines mod more configurable.
body:
This mod made the Compact Machine mod more configurable, current it has these features:
1. This mod allows you to custom Compact Machines' sizes, from 1 to 1024.
2. This mod allows you to disallow entity spawn in Compact Machines. 
3. Allow you to use normal item on compact machine blocks.
4. Add three new size of machine.

For feature one, only the compact machines that are placed after the new config will use the config.

This mod should be compatible with any Compact Machines' extensions.

**Noticed that this mod requires the Compact Machines mod, but it hasn't been published into modrinth, so I cannot register it as a dependencies.**
